name: Dash0
pricing_notes: Usage-based; free tier available; pricing per ingested data volume

performance.notes: OTEL-based async export; minimal hot-path overhead

agent_readiness.notes: OpenTelemetry-native observability backend. Traces, metrics, logs unified. Auto-instrumentation. Kubernetes-native. Newer entrant targeting cloud-native and AI workloads.

gotchas: Newer product — smaller community and less documentation than Honeycomb/Datadog
Kubernetes-centric — less guidance for non-K8s deployments
Support response times less reliable than enterprise incumbents
best_when: Cloud-native Kubernetes teams wanting OTEL-first observability
Teams dissatisfied with Datadog/New Relic pricing looking for alternatives
avoid_when: Need mature AI/LLM observability (use Langfuse/Helicone for that layer)
summary: Dash0 is an OpenTelemetry-native observability backend targeting cloud-native teams unhappy with Datadog/New Relic pricing. OTEL-first design means no vendor lock-in for instrumentation. Kubernetes-native with auto-instrumentation. Newer player with good trajectory but smaller community and documentation than established alternatives.
